## What changed
Describe the change in plain English.

## Why
What user or system problem does this solve?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Prompt change
- [ ] Retrieval change
- [ ] Model change
- [ ] Scheduling logic change
- [ ] UI/dashboard change
- [ ] Security/privacy change
- [ ] Docs only

## User impact
What will users notice?

## System impact
What internal behavior changed?

## Data flow impact
Did any source, sink, transform, or retention behavior change?

## Security / privacy review
- [ ] No PHI/PII handling changed
- [ ] Access control reviewed
- [ ] Logging reviewed
- [ ] Secrets reviewed
- [ ] External vendor/data flow reviewed

## Evals
Attach before/after eval results.
- Faithfulness / groundedness:
- Retrieval relevance:
- Tool call correctness:
- Scheduling success rate:

## Tests run
- [ ] Unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] End-to-end
- [ ] Manual QA

## Rollback plan
How do we revert this safely?

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to issue
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Prompts versioned
- [ ] Config changes documented
- [ ] Reviewer can reproduce locally
